interaction_phrase: have already been launched with our support
occurrence_sentence: The first two studios, [QV Studio](https://www.qventurestudio.com/) in Canada and [Quantum Italia](https://thequantuminsider.com/2024/03/19/towards-the-quantum-future-quantonation-announces-strategic-investment-in-quantum-italia/), have already been launched with our support; more projects are under development in Europe, the Asia-Pacific Region and the US.
